channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: OPEC+ approves August production quota increase as oil exports recover after Strait of Hormuz disruption
item.description: OPEC+ announced that seven of its member countries—Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman—have agreed to increase their combined oil production quotas by 188,000 barrels per...

item.title: Government proposes mandatory driving tests for repeat traffic offenders and interim compensation for road accident victims
item.description: The Union government is preparing significant amendments to the Motor Vehicles Act aimed at improving road safety, strengthening accountability among motorists, and providing quicker financial relief ...

item.title: World Cup Match Delay Affects Pubs and Fans as England Faces Mexico
item.description: England’s World Cup match against Mexico has been delayed by an hour due to extreme weather conditions in Mexico City, prompting concerns over pub hours and fan experiences. The game, originally sched...

item.title: Mass Shooting at July 4th Cookout in Coney Island Leaves 8 Injured
item.description: A mass shooting occurred at a Fourth of July cookout near New York’s Coney Island beach, leaving eight people wounded, including four children under the age of 14. The incident took place Saturday nig...

item.title: Will Ashley and Mika Salamanca's Close Relationship
item.description: Will Ashley recently opened up about his relationship with Mika Salamanca, describing their bond as 'sobrang naging close kami' (extremely close). The celebrity couple, known for their public displays...

item.title: Atiku Accuses Tinubu's Administration of a Pattern of Unresolved Scandals
item.description: Former Vice President and African Democratic Congress (ADC) presidential candidate, Atiku Abubakar, has strongly criticised President Bola Tinubu's administration, saying the government is no longer o...

item.title: Rockies defeat Giants 7-6 with Karros' 3-run homer in 8th
item.description: The Colorado Rockies secured a 7-6 victory over the San Francisco Giants in a thrilling game that saw Kyle Karros deliver a decisive three-run homer in the eighth inning. Karros' 471-foot shot off Dyl...

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump ally's appeal in sexual misconduct case
item.description: The Supreme Court recently rejected an appeal from Roy Moore, a former Alabama Supreme Court chief justice and Trump ally, in a defamation case involving allegations of sexual misconduct. Moore sought...

item.title: ACT victim support registers expand significantly as prison release policy review continues
item.description: Victim Support ACT (VSACT) has experienced a substantial increase in demand since assuming responsibility for the ACT adult offenders register in December 2022. The number of registered victims has gr...

item.title: Edmonton Oilers Extend Contracts for Defencemen Mukhamadullin and Stastney
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers have signed defenceman Shakir Mukhamadullin to a two-year contract extension worth an average annual value of US$1.75 million. Mukhamadullin, 24, was acquired via trade from the Sa...

item.title: Zulu Monarch Dismisses Spokesperson Over Protocol Violation
item.description: King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has abruptly dismissed Prince Thulani kaGqikazi Zulu as both the royal family spokesperson and official monarch spokesperson following a leaked voice note that exposed inter...

item.title: Zanzibar VP Urges Ministers to Engage Citizens Directly
item.description: Zanzibar’s Second Vice President, Mr Hemed Suleiman Abdulla, has directed ministers to prioritize fieldwork over office-based tasks, emphasizing the need to address citizens’ grievances directly. Duri...

item.title: TMC protests enhanced security outside Mamata Banerjee's residence ahead of her planned Baruipur visit
item.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) strongly criticised the deployment of security personnel outside the residence of former West Bengal Chief Minister and party chief Mamata Banerjee ahead of her planned vi...

item.title: Jessica Pegula battles back to defeat Iva Jovic and reach the Wimbledon quarter-finals
item.description: Jessica Pegula produced a composed comeback to defeat fellow American Iva Jovic 4-6, 6-3, 6-1 and book her place in the Wimbledon quarter-finals, matching her best-ever performance at the tournament. ...

item.title: Audio Allegedly Shows Suspected Child Trafficker Claiming Missing Lagos Toddler Was Taken to Anambra
item.description: Fresh developments don emerge for the case of three-year-old Ibrahim Owoduni, wey disappear from outside him family house for Iba New Site, Iyana Iba, Lagos, on January 17, 2026. According to SaharaRe...

item.title: Uber pauses most planned 2026 European market launches while focusing on existing operations and Delivery Hero acquisition efforts
item.description: Uber has paused most of the European market launches it announced earlier this year, scaling back an expansion strategy that originally targeted seven new countries during 2026. According to reporting...

item.title: Congress and VHP exchange sharp words over Opposition leaders' role in Ayodhya Ram Temple donation theft investigation
item.description: The Congress criticised the Vishva Hindu Parishad (VHP) after its international president, Alok Kumar, wrote to the investigating officer handling the alleged Ayodhya Ram Temple donation theft case, r...

item.title: Norway’s Viking Row celebration explained after viral impact at 2026 World Cup
item.description: Norway’s impressive run at the 2026 World Cup has attracted attention not only for their results but also for their unique ‘Viking Row’ celebration, which has quickly become a viral moment in the tour...

item.title: Woman arrested after death of woman in her 50s in Netherton as police continue investigation
item.description: A 30-year-old woman has been arrested on suspicion of murder after a woman in her 50s was found dead at a property in Ambrose Croft, Netherton. Merseyside Police were called to the address at around 1...

item.title: Jello Biafra Makes Stage Return After Stroke Recovery
item.description: Jello Biafra, the former frontman of Dead Kennedys, made a surprise appearance at TentacleFest in San Francisco, joining Wheelchair Sports Camp onstage for a performance of their collaboration 'Make I...
